# CURRENT OPENINGS
We are seeking the brightest minds to research, benchmark, and build the most advanced quantum computing software tools in the industry. 
If 1QBit sounds like a place you’d love to call home, see if one of these positions seems like the right fit for you.
  * [**Quantum Error Correction Scientist**](https://1qbit.com/careers/current-openings/job-description-qec-scientist): 1QBit is looking for an expert in the field of Quantum Error Correction (QEC) to work on theoretical and practical aspects of fault-tolerant quantum computing. 


#### Feel like you were made for 1QBit but don’t see a position that fits your expertise?
We’re always on the lookout for bright minds to augment our multidisciplinary team with new skill sets. Send us an expression of interest and let us know what expertise you can contribute to our team.
While there might not be any open positions posted right now, we regularly hire for the following roles:
![](https://1qbit.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/05/researchers.png)
#### Researchers
Highly motivated individuals who hold graduate degrees in one or more of the following fields: math, physics, engineering, machine learning, or operations research. These individuals work on developing quantum-inspired solutions to industry’s most challenging optimization, sampling, and machine learning problems.
![](https://1qbit.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/05/softwaredevs.png)
#### Software Developers
Talented programmers, often with graduate degrees and a passion for solving problems using new technology. These individuals work with the research team to prototype projects and then develop them into components for our software platforms.
![](https://1qbit.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/05/industryspecialist.png)
#### Industry Specialists
Experienced professionals who have acquired deep knowledge of the finance, life sciences, advanced materials, or energy sectors. These individuals help connect our research, software, and tools to industry.
